ideation: This animation sequence will represent the information symbol (ℹ️) by having the robot's arms mimic the shape of the letter 'i'. The arms will start in a neutral position, then extend upward, and finally form the 'i' shape. The sequence includes slight perturbations to avoid rigidity. Frame 1: Both arms will start at the sides. Frame 2: The right arm will move upward and slightly outward. Frame 3: The left arm will move upward and slightly inward. Frame 4: Both arms will move slightly inward to create a tighter 'i' shape. Frame 5: The arms will return to a neutral position.

frames.beat: right arm lifts, preparing for the 'i'
left arm joins, forming the vertical bar
arms move inward, completing the 'i' shape
arms return to rest, information conveyed
